ModMetaData.name: Auto Everything
ModMetaData.author: gookeryoung
ModMetaData.description:
智能自动万物管理 MOD，为殖民者自动执行人员评级、工作优先级分配与高价值单位标记。
三大功能： - 人员自动评级：按 SSS/SS/S/A/B/C/D/X 八档评级，可选应用评级前缀到名字并重排殖民者栏。综合射击/近战/工作/社交/特质等维度，配偶评级豁免，自定义评级覆盖。 - 工作自动配置：按工作类别与兴趣/技能多遍协调分配工作优先级。紧急工作全员优先，关键/普通/次级专业工作保底 2 人，研究保底 1 人，辅助工作按评级分档。事件驱动 + 2500 tick 冷却 + 战斗中延迟执行避免打断手术。 - 高价值自动标记：为 S+ 档次所有人类单位（殖民者/奴隶/囚犯/敌对/中立/盟友/野生）头顶实时绘制彩色星标，按类别区分颜色，便于一眼识别高价值目标。
零配置开箱即用，每个殖民者根据技能与特质自动识别角色与评级。兼容大多数 MOD，支持存档中途添加。
English: Intelligent auto-everything management MOD. Automatically performs colonist rating, work priority allocation, and high-value pawn marking for colonists.
Three main features: - Auto Tier: rates colonists into SSS/SS/S/A/B/C/D/X tiers, optionally applies tier prefix to names and reorders the colonist bar. Comprehensive evaluation across shooting/melee/work/social/traits, spouse tier exemption, custom tier override. - Auto Work: allocates work priorities via multi-pass coordinated allocation by work category, passion and skill. Emergency work prioritized for all; key/normal/secondary skill work guarantees 2 people; research guarantees 1; service work tiered by rating. Event-driven + 2500 tick cooldown + deferred during combat to avoid interrupting surgery. - Auto Mark Pawn: draws colored star markers above all humanlike pawns of S+ tier (colonists/slaves/prisoners/enemies/neutral/ally/wild) in real time, color-coded by category for quick identification of high-value targets.
Zero config, works out of the box. Each colonist auto-detected by skill and trait. Compatible with most mods. Safe to add mid-save.
